regional_cost_note: Carpet laying in Wellington typically costs $50–$120/m² supply and installed (budget to mid-range), or $15–$30/m² labour only. A 3-bedroom home (~80 m²) runs $4,000–$12,000 all-in including standard underlay. Old carpet removal adds ~$25–$65/m² extra. Most Wellington providers offer free measure and quote.

businesses.name: Marson Flooring Ltd
businesses.known_for: Long-running family-owned showroom (20+ years) supplying and installing carpet and vinyl across Greater Wellington; also does overlocking and mat making.

businesses.name: Ray Kahui Carpet Installation
businesses.known_for: Individual carpet installer operating under SHARAY LIMITED; highest review volume of any individual Wellington carpet layer on Goodnest with consistently high ratings.

businesses.name: A-Z Flooring Wellington
businesses.known_for: Family-run business stocking Feltex, Belgotex, Godfrey Hirst and Karndean; competitive discounted pricing with in-home measure and quote and fast turnaround.

businesses.name: Harrisons Carpet & Flooring Porirua
businesses.known_for: Mobile service bringing samples to your home; three-time winner of Harrisons Top 5-Star Google Reviews Award; covers all Wellington suburbs and Kapiti Coast.

businesses.name: David & Maria's Carpet & Vinyl Warehouse
businesses.known_for: One of Wellington's longest-established flooring retailers (40+ years); specialises in carpet, vinyl, laminate and cork with highly praised installation team.

businesses.name: HB Flooring
businesses.known_for: Carpet tiles, laminate, vinyl, garage carpet and carpet repairs/stretching; 71 completed jobs on Builderscrack with reliable turnaround times.
